VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists with the exact title in PLOS One (2025) and on arXiv (arXiv:2411.06790), authored by Muhammad Shahrul Zaim bin Ahmad and Kazuhiro Takemoto — matching the cited authors precisely. The automated checker's "first author mismatch" is merely a name-formatting difference ("M. Ahmad" vs. the full name "Muhammad Shahrul Zaim bin Ahmad").
